title: Body Camera
body:
EN 🌐 # ABOUT: **Hi, I'm LoLip_p! This is a shader that simulates the effects of a body camera.** ### Looking for more realism? I've released a **[Next-Gen](https://www.patreon.com/posts/body-camera-next-153571705)** version of this shader! It's a complete overhaul based on Rethinking Voxels, bringing RTX lighting to the bodycam aesthetic. Check it out on my [Patreon](https://patreon.com/lolip_p)! # Base version: ### SCREENSHOT: ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/by2i3tnt/images/533f715f849702e1bd609606f17ffbf2b0dc3c58.png) ### Performance: 160 FPS+ - 2K (2560x1440) - 10 chunks - GPU: RX 580 _(8GB)_ - CPU: Ryzen 5 1500X ## THE SHADER HAS: - Fisheye Effect - Auto Exposure - Support [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) - Support [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - PBR support _(LabPBR)_ - Chromatic Aberration - Thermal Imager - Night vision goggles - Support 3 language: _EN RU FR_ ### Recommended settings: - Brightness: 0 - Field of view (Fov): 110 ## LINKS: - [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) (Discuss, Bug Reports, Etc.) - [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p) ## INSTALL THE SHADERS - Download Client Which Supports Installing Shaders Such As Optifine And Iris - Download The Shaders - Copy Shaders to /.minecraft/shaderpacks - Launch Minecraft, Go To Options --> Video Settings --> Shaders - Choose **Body Camera Shader** ## DEMO VIDEO
RU 🐻 # О: **Привет, я LoLip_p! Это шейдер, который имитирует эффекты камеры, установленной на теле.** ### Ищете больше реализма? Я выпустил **[Next-Gen](https://www.patreon.com/posts/body-camera-next-153571705)** версию этого шейдера! Это полностью переработанная версия, основанная на подходе «Rethinking Voxels», которая добавляет освещение RTX в стиле «bodycam». Посмотрите его на моем [Patreon](https://patreon.com/lolip_p)! # Базовая версия: ### СКРИНШОТ: ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/by2i3tnt/images/533f715f849702e1bd609606f17ffbf2b0dc3c58.png) ### Производительность: 160 FPS+ - 2K (2560x1440) - 10 chunks - GPU: RX 580 _(8GB)_ - CPU: Ryzen 5 1500X ## ШЕЙДЕР ИМЕЕТ: - Эффект рыбьего глаза - Авто экспозиция - Поддержка [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) - Поддержка [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - Поддержка PBR _(LabPBR)_ - Хроматическая аберрация - Тепловизор - Очки ночного видения - Поддержка 3 языков: _EN RU FR_ ### Рекомендуемые настройки: - Яркость: 0 - Поле зрения (Fov): 110 ## ССЫЛКИ: - [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) (Discuss, Bug Reports, Etc.) - [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p) ## УСТАНОВКА ШЕЙДЕРА - Скачать клиент, поддерживающий установку шейдеров, таких как Optifine и Iris - Скачать шейдеры - Копировать шейдеры в /.minecraft/shaderpacks - Запустите Minecraft, перейдите в «Настройки» --> Видео Настройки --> Shaders - Выбери **Body Camera Shader** ## ДЕМО-ВИДЕО
CH 🐉 # 关于: **你好，我是LoLip_p！这是模拟随身摄像机效果的着色器** ### 想要更逼真的效果吗？ 我已经发布了这款着色器的 **[次世代](https://www.patreon.com/posts/body-camera-next-153571705)** 版本！这是基于《Rethinking Voxels》进行的一次全面重制，将 RTX 光照技术融入了随身摄像头的视觉风格。 欢迎前往我的 [Patreon](https://patreon.com/lolip_p) 查看！ # Base version: ### 屏幕截图: ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/by2i3tnt/images/533f715f849702e1bd609606f17ffbf2b0dc3c58.png) ### 性能: 160 FPS+ - 2K (2560x1440) - 10 chunks - GPU: RX 580 _(8GB)_ - CPU: Ryzen 5 1500X ## 着色器具有： - 鱼眼效果 - 自动曝光 - 支持[Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) - 支持[Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - PBR支持 _(LabPBR)_ - 色差 - 热成像仪 - 夜视镜 - 支持3种语言：_EN RU FR_ ### 推荐设置： - 亮度：0 - 视野（Fov）：110 ## 链接: - [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) (Discuss, Bug Reports, Etc.) - [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p) ## 安装着色器 - 下载支持安装着色器的客户端（如Optifine或Iris） - 下载着色器资源包 - 将着色器文件复制到 /.minecraft/shaderpacks 目录 - 启动Minecraft，进入选项 --> 视频设置 --> 着色器 - 选择 **Body Camera Shader** ## 演示视频
BR 🎭 # SOBRE: **Olá, sou o LoLip_p! Este é um shader que simula os efeitos de uma câmera corporal.** ### Quer mais realismo? Lancei uma versão **[Next-Gen](https://www.patreon.com/posts/body-camera-next-153571705)** deste shader! Trata-se de uma reformulação completa baseada no Rethinking Voxels, que traz iluminação RTX para a estética das câmeras corporais. Confira no meu [Patreon](https://patreon.com/lolip_p)! # Base version: ### CAPTURA DE TELA: ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/by2i3tnt/images/533f715f849702e1bd609606f17ffbf2b0dc3c58.png) ### Desempenho: 160 FPS+ - 2K (2560x1440) - 10 chunks - GPU: RX 580 _(8GB)_ - CPU: Ryzen 5 1500X ## O SHADER TEM: - Efeito olho de peixe - Exposição automática - Suporte para [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) - Suporte para [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - Suporte PBR _(LabPBR)_ - Aberração cromática - Termovisor - Óculos de visão noturna - Suporte a 3 idiomas: _EN RU FR_ ### Configurações recomendadas: - Brilho: 0 - Campo de visão (Fov): 110 ## LINKS: - [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) (Discuss, Bug Reports, Etc.) - [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p) ## INSTALE OS SHADERS - Baixe um cliente que suporte a instalação de shaders, como Optifine e Iris - Baixe os shaders - Copie os shaders para /.minecraft/shaderpacks - Inicie o Minecraft, vá para Opções --> Configurações de vídeo --> Shaders - Escolha **Body Camera Shader** ## VÍDEO DE DEMONSTRAÇÃO
DE 🍺 # ÜBER: **Hallo, ich bin LoLip_p! Dies ist ein Shader, der die Effekte einer Körperkamera simuliert.** ### Lust auf noch mehr Realismus? Ich habe eine **[Next-Gen](https://www.patreon.com/posts/body-camera-next-153571705)**-Version dieses Shaders veröffentlicht! Es handelt sich um eine komplette Überarbeitung auf Basis von „Rethinking Voxels“, die RTX-Beleuchtung in die Bodycam-Ästhetik integriert. Schau sie dir auf meinem [Patreon](https://patreon.com/lolip_p) an! # Base version: ### SCREENSHOT: ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/by2i3tnt/images/533f715f849702e1bd609606f17ffbf2b0dc3c58.png) ### Leistung: 160 FPS+ - 2K (2560x1440) - 10 chunks - GPU: RX 580 _(8GB)_ - CPU: Ryzen 5 1500X ## DER SHADER VERFÜGT ÜBER: - Fisheye-Effekt - Automatische Belichtung - Unterstützung für [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) - Unterstützung für [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - PBR-Unterstützung _(LabPBR)_ - Chromatische Aberration - Wärmebildkamera - Nachtsichtbrille - Unterstützung für 3 Sprachen: _EN RU FR_ ### Empfohlene Einstellungen: - Helligkeit: 0 - Sichtfeld (Fov): 110 ## LINKS: - [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) (Discuss, Bug Reports, Etc.) - [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p) ## INSTALLIEREN SIE DIE SHADER - Client herunterladen, der die Installation von Shadern wie Optifine und Iris unterstützt - Shader herunterladen - Shader nach /.minecraft/shaderpacks kopieren - Minecraft starten, zu Optionen --> Videoeinstellungen --> Shader gehen - **Body Camera Shader** auswählen ## DEMO VIDEO
FR 🥐 # À PROPOS: **Bonjour, je suis LoLip_p ! Voici un shader qui simule les effets d'une caméra corporelle.** ### Envie d'un rendu encore plus réaliste ? J'ai publié une version **[Next-Gen](https://www.patreon.com/posts/body-camera-next-153571705)** de ce shader ! Il s'agit d'une refonte complète inspirée de « Rethinking Voxels », qui intègre l'éclairage RTX à l'esthétique des caméras corporelles. Découvrez-la sur mon [Patreon](https://patreon.com/lolip_p) ! # Base version: ### CAPTURE D'ÉCRAN: ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/by2i3tnt/images/533f715f849702e1bd609606f17ffbf2b0dc3c58.png) ### Performance: 160 FPS+ - 2K (2560x1440) - 10 chunks - GPU: RX 580 _(8GB)_ - CPU: Ryzen 5 1500X ## LE SHADER DISPOSE DE : - Effet fisheye - Exposition automatique - Prise en charge de [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) - Prise en charge de [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - Prise en charge PBR _(LabPBR)_ - Aberration chromatique - Imageur thermique - Lunettes de vision nocturne - Prise en charge de 3 langues : _EN RU FR_ ### Paramètres recommandés : - Luminosité : 0 - Champ de vision (Fov) : 110 ## LIENS: - [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) (Discuss, Bug Reports, Etc.) - [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community) - [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p) ## INSTALLER LES SHADERS - Téléchargez un client prenant en charge l'installation de shaders tels que Optifine et Iris - Téléchargez les shaders - Copiez les shaders dans /.minecraft/shaderpacks - Lancez Minecraft, allez dans Options --> Paramètres vidéo --> Shaders - Choisissez **Body Camera Shader** ## VIDÉO DE DÉMONSTRATION
[![NeyHost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b88f233b0b7819fa09603e3da40613cb199093f7_0.webp)](https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=LOLIP30)
